page_metadata.biotools__summary: SA-Mot is a wbe server for the extraction and location of structural motifs of interest from protein loops. Recurrent and conserved structural motifs involved in structural redundancy of loops are considered.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SA-Mot is a wbe server for the extraction and location of structural motifs of interest from protein loops. Recurrent and conserved structural motifs involved in structural redundancy of loops are considered.
